Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to group the events into cases patient journeys There is no explicit case ID However we have event attributes that allow grouping We need to consider attributes like patient age gender department and especially activities sequence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The events are interleaved across three patients likely three separate cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets examine each line 1 Register patient at ER age45 M 2 Register patient at ER age62 F 3 Register patient at Surgery age28 M So we have three distinct patients maybe three cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then subsequent events must align For case of patient age45 M 4 Initial triage age45 M 7 X ray imaging age45 M 12 Doctor consultation age45 M 15 Patient discharged age45 M That seems like a case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case for patient age62 F 5 Initial triage age62 F 8 Lab test requested age62 F 10 Lab test completed age62 F 11 Doctor consultation age62 F 14 Prescription created age62 F 17 Patient discharged age62 F That matches

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case for patient age28 M Surgery 3 Register patient Surgery 6 Doctor consultation Surgery though its also called Doctor consultation but with reason scheduled knee surgery that seems like a pre op consult 9 Surgery preparation 13 Surgery performed 16 Recovery room 18 Patient discharged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus grouping is straightforward we assign case IDs case1 for age45 M case2 for age62 F case3 for age28 M

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check events 2 is registration for 62F 5 is triage 8 is lab test requested 10 lab test completed 11 doctor consultation 14 prescription 17 discharge Yes consistent

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check events for case3 3 registration 6 doctor consultation 9 surgery preparation 13 surgery performed 16 recovery room 18 discharge

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These have same activity but different patients So they are clearly separated One could also consider department attribute the Register patient events are for two different departments ER for cases 1 and 2 Surgery for case3 That also helps
